zh.lifeSummary: 當Ernulf de Hesdin於1038年出生在法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯賀斯丁時，他的母親Nesta verch Gruffydd14歲，父親Gerard de Hesdin24歲。他和Ammeline de Baladon至少有1個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1098年在土耳其哈代安塔吉亞安塔吉亞享年60歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Hesdin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish (Longford and Leitrim): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hEislin, a shortened form of the older Ó hEisleanáin ‘descendant of Eisleanán’, a byname probably derived from éislinn ‘unsafe, weak’.

English: from the Middle English and Old French personal name Alselin, from ancient Germanic Anselin, with assimilatory change of n to the following -l-. This is a French form of ancient Germanic Ans(e)helm, composed of the elements ans- ‘(pagan) god’ and helm- ‘helmet’; compare Anselm .
English: topographic name for a dweller ‘(by the) hazel copse’, from Old English hæsling, or a habitational name from any of various minor places called with this word.

variants.name: Henslin
meanings: Irish: possibly a variant of   Heslin  .
South German: from a pet form of   Hensel   (see   Hans  ).

variants.name: Anselm
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Klaus, Heinz.

English and German: from the ancient Germanic personal name Anshelm, composed of the elements ans- ‘god’ + helm ‘protection, helmet’. The personal name was taken to France and England by St. Anselm (c. 1033–1109), known as the Father of Scholasticism. He was born in Aosta, Italy, joined the Benedictine order at Bec in Normandy, France, and in 1093 became archbishop of Canterbury, England.

nameMeanings.name: Ernulf
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Ernulf de Hesdin was born in 1038, in Hesdin, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, his mother, Nesta verch Gruffydd, was 14 and his father, Gerard de Hesdin, was 24. He had at least 1 son and 2 daughters with Ammeline de Baladon. He died in 1098, in Antakya, Antakya, Hatay, Türkiye, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ernulf de Hesdin est né en 1038, à Hesdin, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, sa mère, Nesta verch Gruffydd, avait 14 ans et son père, Gerard de Hesdin, avait 24 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles avec Ammeline de Baladon. Il est décédé en 1098, à Antakya, Antakya, Hatay, Turquie, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ernulf de Hesdin 1038 in Hesdin, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war seine Mutter Nesta verch Gruffydd 14 und sein Vater Gerard de Hesdin 24. Er hatte mit Ammeline de Baladon mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1098 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Antakya, Antakya, Hatay, Türkei.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ernulf de Hesdin è nato il nel 1038 nel Hesdin, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, il suo madre, Nesta verch Gruffydd, aveva 14 anni e il suo padre, Gerard de Hesdin, aveva 24 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie con Ammeline de Baladon. Morì nel 1098, nel Antakya, Antakya, Hatay, Turchia, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ernulf de Hesdinが1038年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスプアス-デ-カレイスヘスディンで生まれた時，母Nesta verch Gruffyddは14歳，父Gerard de Hesdinは24歳であった。彼はAmmeline de Baladonとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1098年にトルコハティイアンタクヤアンタクヤで60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ernulf de Hesdin(이)가 1038년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 파스-데-캘레이 헤즈딘에서 태어났을 때, 그의 어머니 Nesta verch Gruffydd(은)는 14세였고, 그의 아버지 Gerard de Hesdin(은)는 24세였다. 그는 Ammeline de Baladon(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1098년 튀르키예 하타이 앤타키아 앤타키아에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ernulf de Hesdin nasceu em 1038, em Hesdin, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, França, sua mãe, Nesta verch Gruffydd, tinha 14 anos e seu pai, Gerard de Hesdin, tinha 24 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas com Ammeline de Baladon. Ele faleceu em 1098, em Antakya, Antakya, Hatay, Turquia, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ernulf de Hesdin родился в 1038 г. в местности хесдин, пас-де-калеи, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция, его матери по имени Nesta verch Gruffydd было 14 лет, а отцу, которого звали Gerard de Hesdin, 24. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери от Ammeline de Baladon. Он умер в 1098 г. в местности антакя, антакя, хатеи, Турция в возрасте 60 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ernulf de Hesdin nació en 1038, en Hesdin, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, su mamá, Nesta verch Gruffydd, tenía 14 años y su papá, Gerard de Hesdin, tenía 24 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas con Ammeline de Baladon. Murió en 1098, en Antakya, Antakya, Hatay, Turquía, a la edad de 60 años.
